command_summary: codex exec 0.144.1 --ephemeral --sandbox read-only in an isolated empty workspace with gpt-5.6-sol, high reasoning, installed design-craft 0.5.0, and the exact benchmark prompt; final response normalized only for trailing whitespace

style_authority.note: Preserved calm high-frequency utility motion and direct-manipulation causality.

reference_selection.note: Applied motion quality, interaction physics, accessibility, product, and validation guidance precisely.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Removed decorative scale, transition-all, and ease-in behavior while retaining only causal motion.

evidence_level.note: Explicitly labeled static source evidence without claiming browser timing, frame, or device proof.

verified_boundary.note: Distinguished code-visible defects from unverified runtime feel, performance, scrolling conflict, and touch behavior.

design_moves.note: Covered grab offset, capture, tracking, presentation interruption, velocity handoff, projection, hysteresis, soft bounds, and Reduced Motion.

scope_control.note: Stayed read-only and motion-focused, but the response was substantially more verbose than necessary.
